description: Create a Linux GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push to all branches except certain paths, on pull requests to all branches except certain paths, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build and wheels. The build job runs on a matrix of Python versions and ubuntu-20.04, sets up Python, builds and installs the package, and tests with pytest. The wheels job runs on ubuntu-latest, builds and tests wheels for multiple architectures and manylinux environments, archives the wheels and sdist, and publishes them to PyPI under certain conditions.
